services.llm_usage_prompt: To use api.cdp.coinbase.com/platform/v2/x402`, call https://api.cdp.coinbase.com/platform/v2/x402` with x402 payment of 0.01 USDC. Send json input. Returns json. Description: x402-compatible service at api.cdp.coinbase.com/platform/v2/x402`
services.sdk_snippet_python:
